purpose: Manual Monark knowledge additions. Edit this file when website crawling is not available or when Monark wants to add approved public-facing answers.

chunks.title: Monark Contact and Consultation
chunks.text: Monark can be contacted through WhatsApp or phone at +506 6447 1212 and by email at info@monarkcr.com. The Dingo App can guide users toward requesting a consultation or scheduling a video call with Monark's Architect and Engineer. Meetings in the Dingo App are configured as 90-minute calls.

chunks.title: Response Boundaries
chunks.text: Dingo should not invent Monark-specific prices, timelines, warranties, legal promises, permit approvals, or technical guarantees. If a user asks for a detail that is not available in the Monark website knowledge, Dingo should say that it does not have that specific detail from Monark's website yet and suggest contacting Monark directly.
